key.name: enabled
key.description: When true, the extension will spawn and supervise the milkdrop renderer process

key.name: monitor
key.description: Target monitor index passed to the renderer at startup

key.name: opacity
key.description: Opacity forwarded to the renderer, from transparent to fully opaque

key.name: preset-dir
key.description: Directory containing .milk presets

key.name: shuffle
key.description: If true, preset selection should use random ordering when supported

key.name: preset-rotation-interval
key.description: Seconds before automatically switching to the next preset. Applied live via the control socket

key.name: overlay
key.description: Passes --overlay to the renderer at startup and updates the control socket when changed. State is reflected in the control status command; additional visual behavior may be added later

key.name: pause-on-fullscreen
key.summary: Pause when a fullscreen window is on the same monitor
key.description: When true, the extension pauses the renderer whenever a fullscreen window covers the renderer's monitor

key.name: pause-on-maximized
key.summary: Pause when a maximized window is on the same monitor
key.description: When true, the extension pauses the renderer whenever a maximized window covers the renderer's monitor

key.name: media-aware
key.summary: Pause when no media player is playing
key.description: When true, the extension pauses the renderer whenever no MPRIS media player reports a Playing state

key.name: pause-on-empty-desktop
key.summary: Pause when other windows are present
key.description: When true, pause the visualizer if any application windows exist on the active workspace (excluding docks, panels, desktop windows, and the renderer itself)

key.name: stop-renderer-when-idle
key.description: When enabled together with media-aware mode, fully stops the renderer process when no media is playing to save CPU/GPU resources. The renderer is restarted automatically when playback resumes

key.name: fps
key.description: Target frames per second for the renderer. Changes are applied live via the control socket

key.name: beat-sensitivity
key.description: How strongly projectM reacts to beat detection. Applied live via the control socket

key.name: hard-cut-enabled
key.description: When true, projectM performs abrupt preset transitions on strong beats

key.name: hard-cut-sensitivity
key.description: Beat strength required to trigger a hard cut. Only meaningful when hard cuts are enabled

key.name: hard-cut-duration
key.description: Minimum seconds a preset must display before a hard cut is allowed. Applied live via the control socket

key.name: soft-cut-duration
key.description: Duration in seconds for a smooth preset cross-fade transition. Applied live via the control socket

key.name: all-monitors
key.summary: Show visualizer on all connected monitors
key.description: When true, the extension spawns one renderer instance per connected monitor instead of only the selected monitor

key.name: last-preset
key.description: Path to the last preset that was playing when the extension was disabled. Used to restore state on next enable

key.name: was-paused
key.summary: Whether renderer was paused on exit
key.description: True if the renderer was paused when the extension was disabled. Used to restore pause state on next enable

key.name: gpu-profile
key.description: 'default': Use the system's default GPU. 'dri-prime': Offload rendering to the discrete GPU via Mesa PRIME (DRI_PRIME=1). 'nvidia-optimus': Offload rendering to the NVIDIA GPU via proprietary driver PRIME. Applied as environment variables when the renderer process is spawned
